1099-misc:box1.label: Rents
1099-misc:box1.so: Tani waa wadarta lacagta kirada ee aad heshay sanadkan, tusaale ahaan haddii aad guri ama dhul kireysay.
1099-misc:box1.en: This is the total rent money you received this year, for example if you rented out a house or land.

1099-misc:box3.label: Other income
1099-misc:box3.so: Tani waa lacag kale oo aad heshay sanadkan oo aan ku habboonayn sanduuqyada kale ee foomkan.
1099-misc:box3.en: This is other money you received this year that doesn't fit the other boxes on this form.

1099-misc:box4.label: Federal income tax withheld
1099-misc:box4.so: Tani waa lacagta canshuurta federaalka ah ee horay laga jaray lacagtan, oo dawladda federaalka loo diray.
1099-misc:box4.en: This is the federal tax that was already taken out of this payment and sent to the government.
